title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 347.189 - Requires filing property control affidavit in certain cities, including Kansas City
text:
347.189.  Requires filing property control affidavit in certain cities, including Kansas City. — Any limited liability company that owns and rents or leases real property, or owns unoccupied real property, located within any home rule city with a population of more than four hundred thousand inhabitants which is located in more than one county, shall file with that city's clerk an affidavit listing the name and address of at least one person, who has management control and responsibility for the real property owned and leased or rented by the limited liability company, or owned by the limited liability company and unoccupied.
(L. 2000 S.B. 896 § 1, Repealed L. 2001 S.B. 288, A.L. 2001 S.B. 178 merged with S.B. 345)
